title: Emergency detector has substring false positives
body: detectEmergency() matches keywords as raw substrings, so harmless words trigger emergencies: 'keystroke' matches 'stroke', 'weakened' matches 'weak', 'monitoring' matches nothing but 'falling asleep' matches 'fallen'? Match keywords only at word boundaries (case-insensitive), so 'I was typing a keystroke' is NOT an emergency but 'I think I am having a stroke' IS. Multi-word keywords must still match as phrases. Keep the exported API and severity precedence unchanged.
